ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_taken_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was taken */,
  "sample_received_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was received by the lab */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., Acceptance) */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., Concrete, Soil, Aggregate) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to documentation or report related to the sample */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., pending, received, in progress, completed) */,
  "sample_quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the sample collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "sample_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sample (e.g., good, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project site */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID of the project manager */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "project_phase" TEXT /* Current phase of the project (e.g., planning, execution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, project manager, QA) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., quality assurance, project management) */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the user (e.g., engineer, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sample being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., physical, chemical) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes related to the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type (e.g., Concrete, Soil) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  "material_category" TEXT /* Category of the material type (e.g., construction material, aggregates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_projects" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sample ID */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project ID */,
  "sample_project_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample in the context of the project (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "project_id")
)
